meta.title: North American Energy Infrastructure: Will Congress Act?
meta.description: With ongoing questions surrounding the adequacy of energy infrastructure and the Keystone XL pipeline still on hold, Hudson Institute is pleased to host a senior member of the House Energy and Commerce Committee, Representative Gene Green (D-TX-29). Rep. Green is principal co-sponsor of bipartisan legislation, the North American Energy Infrastructure Act (H.R. 3301), which aims to modernize the current permitting process for the construction of natural gas and petroleum pipelines and electrical
